prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（含物理类）最低位次分别为约38名、30名、46名、34名、34名，整体在30–46名区间波动，近两年稳定在34名附近，2025年基准位次约34名。\ n该校在青海省理科（物理类）招生计划：2021年4人、2022年3人、2023年3人、2024年2人、2025年2人，呈逐年缩减趋势；2026年物理类计划增至3人，较2 025年扩招50%，扩招幅度显著，将导致竞争加剧、最低位次后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 复旦大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名连续多年稳居第5名（Top 5），属全国顶尖高校层次，对高分考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面（涉及师德师风与学校管理事件），但2025年声誉偏正面（新闻传播学A++等科研成 果）；抖音学校热度排名第4（高热），短视频曝光量极大，反映报考关注度持续升温；历史投档异常方面，2022年河南理科投档线曾出现暴跌，但2023年湖南文科分数线仍居高 位，整体报考热度不减；复旦大学拥有27个A-及以上学科，其中数学A+、物理学A+、中国语言文学A+、新闻传播学A+、理论经济学A+、临床医学A等均为全国顶 尖水平，与招生专业高度关联，学科实力对考生有强大吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年物理类招生专业为理科试验班（相辉学堂相辉计划，含数学、物理、化学、生物科 学）和工科试验班（相辉学堂香农计划，含集成电路、人工智能等），均为当前高热推荐方向（计算机类、电子信息/通信均为高热推荐）；青海省2026年物理类考生估算约30864 人，较2025年略增约1.3%，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次34名、2026年物理类扩招50%（位次后移主因）、考生规 模小幅增加、学校声誉与抖音热度持续高位、招生专业均为高热方向等因素，预计2026年理科最低位次较2025年明显后移；预测最低位次约47名，区间37–57名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班（相辉学堂相辉计划）
- 工科试验班（相辉学堂香农计划）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
暂无其他物理类招生专业，上述两专业均为顶尖班型，难度接近。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
暂无。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 复旦大学在青海省物理类仅招3人（2026年），招生人数极少，竞争极为激烈。位次在预测区间（37–57名）内的考生可尝试冲刺，但需做好充分准备；位次明显优于区间上限（< 37名）录取概率较大；位次低于区间下限（>57名）则风险较高，建议以其他顶尖高校作为稳妥选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science (including physics category) were approximately 38, 30, 46, 34, and 34 respectively, fluctuating within the range of 30–46, stabilizing near 34 in recent two years, with a baseline ranking of about 34 in 2025.\ nThe enrollment plan for Fudan University in Qinghai Province for science (physics category) was: 4 in 2021, 3 in 2022, 3 in 2023, 2 in 2024, and 2 in 2025, showing a decreasing trend; in 2026, the physics category plan increases to 3, a 50% expansion compared to 2025, which will intensify competition and shift the lowest ranking downward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university, consistently ranking 5th (Top 5) in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings for many years, belonging to the top tier of national universities, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates; in 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative (involving teacher ethics and school management incidents), but in 2025, reputation was positive (e.g., A++ in Journalism and Communication and other research achievements); Douyin school popularity ranks 4th (high heat), with massive short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising application attention; regarding historical admission anomalies, the science admission line in Henan in 2022 experienced a sharp drop, but the liberal arts admission line in Hunan in 2023 remained high, overall application heat not diminishing; Fudan University has 27 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Mathematics, Physics, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, Theoretical Economics, and A in Clinical Medicine, all at the national top level, highly relevant to the enrollment majors, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the physics category enrollment majors are Science Experimental Class (Xianghui Academy Xianghui Plan, including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, and Biological Sciences) and Engineering Experimental Class (Xianghui Academy Shannon Plan, including Integrated Circuits, Artificial Intelligence, etc.), both currently highly recommended directions (Computer Science, Electronics/Communication are highly recommended); the estimated number of physics category candidates in Qinghai Province in 2026 is about 30,864, a slight increase of about 1.3% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 34, the 50% expansion in physics category in 2026 (main reason for ranking shift downward), a small increase in candidate numbers, sustained high school reputation and Douyin heat, and enrollment majors all being high-heat directions, it is expected that the lowest ranking for science in 2026 will significantly shift downward compared to 2025; the predicted lowest ranking is about 47, with a range of 37–57.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Xianghui Academy Xianghui Plan)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Xianghui Academy Shannon Plan).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
No other physics category enrollment majors currently; the above two majors are both top-tier classes with similar difficulty.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
None currently.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Fudan University only enrolls 3 students in the physics category in Qinghai Province (2026), with extremely few admissions, leading to intense competition. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range (37–57) can attempt to apply but need thorough preparation; those with rankings significantly above the upper limit (< 37) have a higher probability of admission; those with rankings below the lower limit (> 57) face higher risk and are advised to consider other top universities as safer options.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次29名（新高考首年后移）、2026年招生计划持平、历史类考生略减 、学校声誉与抖音热度高位、招生专业均为文科热门方向等因素，预计2026年文科最低位次较2025年略有回调（更易进）；预测最低位次约27名，区间19–35名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (including history category) were approximately 21st, 2022, 21st, 20th, and 29th respectively. From 2021 to 2024, it remained stable in the 20–21 range. In 2025 (the first year of the new Gaokao for history category), the ranking significantly dropped to 29th, reflecting the impact of the new Gaokao model. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Qinghai Province: 6 students in 2021, 5 in 2023, 5 in 2024, 8 in 2025, and 8 in 2026. Starting from 2025, it expanded to 8 students, and 2026 remains the same as 2025, with a stable plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. It ranks 5th (Top 5) in the Soft Science China University Rankings, making it a top-tier national university with strong liberal arts capabilities. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, but in 2025 it was positive (e.g., Journalism and Communication A++, etc.). Its Douyin popularity ranks 4th (high heat), and application attention continues to rise. Regarding historical admission anomalies, in 2022, the science admission score in Henan Province plummeted, but the liberal arts score remained high, with overall application heat undiminished. Fudan University's liberal arts advantages are prominent: Chinese Language and Literature A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Philosophy A+, Theoretical Economics A+, Political Science A+, Law A-, etc., all are top or leading in the country, highly matching the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the history category enrollment majors are Economics (including Finance, Economics, etc., with differentiated heat but overall trending hot), Humanities Experimental Class (including Chinese Language and Literature, History, Philosophy, with Chinese/Chinese recommended), and Law (differentiated heat but the Five Institutes and Four Schools remain hot). In 2026, the estimated number of history category examinees in Qinghai Province is about 17,136, a slight decrease of about 0.4% compared to 2025, indicating slightly eased competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 29th (shifted after the first year of the new Gaokao), the 2026 enrollment plan remaining stable, a slight decrease in history category examinees, high university reputation and Douyin popularity, and enrollment majors all being popular liberal arts directions, it is expected that the minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 will slightly recover (easier to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 27th, with a range of 19–35.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Economics (including Finance, Economics, International Economics and Trade, etc.)
- Law.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Humanities Experimental Class (including Chinese Language and Literature, History, Philosophy).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
None at present.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Fudan University enrolls 8 students in the history category in Qinghai Province (2026), with a small number of admissions. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range (19–35) can actively apply; those with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<19) have a higher admission probability and can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Economics or Law; those with rankings below the lower limit (>35) face higher risk and are advised to consider other top universities as alternatives.
